About.title: Discover What We Do
About.description: Welfare Plus is a Finland-based business organization affiliated to organizations abroad, and we are dedicated to improving wellbeing across countries and communities.

research.title: We Provide Social Work research
research.description: Evidence-based research and advocacy to strengthen social welfare systems.

products.title: We sell Assistive Products & Technologies,
products.description: Facilitating access to global assistive solutions for diverse population groups.

programs.title: We Facilitate Social program development.
programs.description: Holistic social care supporting access to basic human needs.

slides.title: International Initiatives for Holistic Wellbeing and Inclusive Social Development.
slides.subtitle: Facilitating access to basic social welfare needs and the Penta-Helix model of partnerships on social projects for sustainable development. And scaling up international social work research, advocacy, policies and programs for holistic well-being.

slides.title: “The basis of social work lies in deficiencies in social systems.” – Paul Tillich
“You may need social work at any time in the life cycle.” – Social Work England
